title: Export Chat to Markdown
overviewMarkdown:
Exports the full current conversation to a downloadable `.md` file.

To use: ask the AI to *"export this chat"* or *"save this conversation as markdown"*.
pluginContext: When the user asks to export, save, or download this chat or conversation, call the export_chat_to_markdown function. Before calling it, compile the COMPLETE conversation — every user message and every assistant reply — into Markdown format. Use '## User' and '## Assistant' as headings before each message. Preserve all code blocks, lists, formatting, and the full text of every message. Do not summarize or truncate anything.

openAPISpec.name: export_chat_to_markdown
openAPISpec.description: Export the full current conversation to a downloadable Markdown (.md) file. Call this when the user asks to export, save, or download the chat.

content.description: The COMPLETE conversation formatted as Markdown. Must include ALL messages — every user message and every assistant reply — with ## User and ## Assistant headings. Do not summarize or truncate.

filename.description: Optional filename without the .md extension (e.g. 'my-chat'). Defaults to chat-export-YYYY-MM-DD.
